creator: mikkel@troest.dk
text:
Tested with OOWriter 2.3.1 and 2.4.0 with exactly same result.
I'm running i386 FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE.

I then tried running OOWriter under sudo (sudo openoffice.org-2.4.0 
-writer) and now the error does NOT occur!
It is not a usable work-around, though, but I guess it's interesting to 
know that the digital signature functions work when running with root 
privileges...
Please let me know if you need me to supply further info reagrding my 
setup, and which commands I should use to produce traces/debugs if needed.

Best regards
Mikkel Troest
